seoTitle: How to Add a Border Around a Text Box in Canva
metaDescription: Learn how to add and customize a border around a text box in Canva to make text stand out in ads, social graphics, and presentations.
intro: A well-placed border can make text stand out and give your designs a more polished, professional finish. This tutorial covers how to add and customize a border around a text box in Canva for a range of design projects.

steps.heading: Navigate Canva's text tools
steps.body: Locate the tools you'll need to select and modify a text box.

steps.heading: Choose the right text box
steps.body: Select the specific text box you want to add a border to.

steps.heading: Add a border
steps.body: Apply a border around the chosen text box using Canva's design options.

steps.heading: Customize your border
steps.body: Adjust color, thickness, and style so the border matches your overall design.

steps.heading: Apply to practical use cases
steps.body: Use bordered text boxes in ads, social graphics, or presentations for a stronger visual impact.

faq.question: Can I customize the color and thickness of the border?
faq.answer: Yes, Canva offers various customization options for borders including color, thickness, and style.

faq.question: Is this technique useful for business ads?
faq.answer: Yes, businesses looking to create engaging ads often use bordered text boxes to draw attention to key messages.

faq.question: Do I need prior design experience?
faq.answer: No, this step-by-step guide is designed to be user-friendly for beginners as well as experienced designers.

faq.question: Can borders help with brand consistency?
faq.answer: Yes, using consistent border styles through templates can help apply your branding standards across designs.
